name: External (Protected)
description: Use this classification to identify and protect Confidential data that can be shared with approved parties outside the Organization.
tooltip: Use this classification to identify and protect Confidential data that can be shared with approved parties outside the Organization.

parent.name: Confidential
parent.description: Use this classification to identify and protect data which is sensitive, and which should be shared more carefully.
parent.tooltip: Use this classification to identify and protect data which is sensitive, and which should be shared more carefully.
